scope: co-change coupling (CCC) scoring signal for hidden git-history coupling without explicit import edges
ccc recommendations and deterministic tp/tn fixture coverage

test_evidence.suite: python -m pytest tests/test_scoring.py tests/test_co_change_coupling.py tests/test_recommendations.py tests/test_config.py tests/test_signal_contract.py -q --tb=short --maxfail=1 && python -m pytest tests/ --ignore=tests/test_smoke.py --ignore=tests/test_precision_recall.py -q --tb=short --maxfail=5

notes: Feature-evidence artifact added to satisfy the feature-evidence gate for a new scoring signal.
CCC rollout is intentionally conservative (default weight 0.005, no automatic CRITICAL escalation in the initial release).
